assertions.title: Dashboard displays enriched lead data from upgraded pipeline

steps.action: Open /, search for '18820 Nw 57 Ave', open Villa Rustica Condo lead drawer
steps.expected: Drawer shows enriched outreach + homestead badge + EV score factor
steps.observed: Drawer shows enriched outreach and EV factor in score popover; homestead badge is absent

steps.action: Open score popover from score badge
Check homestead availability in main leads dataset
steps.expected: At least some leads show Homestead/Non-Homestead badge
steps.observed: No homestead badges rendered; dataset inspection shows homestead is null for all 13,201 leads

assertions.issues: Required homestead badge criterion was not satisfied in current dataset/rendered drawer state.

assertions.title: Filter + pagination + sort compose correctly across all new features

steps.action: Apply search='miami', status='New', sort='Score (high→low)', go to page 2
steps.expected: All constraints hold together and include insurer filter selection
steps.observed: Search/status/sort/page constraints hold (25 rows, non-increasing scores, page 2), but insurer filter has only one option ('All insurers') so insurer filtering cannot be exercised
Spot-check row text remains Miami/New and list order remains score-descending

assertions.issues: Assertion requires selecting insurer filter as part of composed constraints, but no insurer options are available beyond 'All insurers'.

assertions.title: Mobile layout preserves all new filter functionality

steps.action: Set viewport to 375x812 and open Leads
steps.expected: Mobile layout keeps filter/search/pagination controls accessible
steps.observed: Mobile nav, search, status, sort, and pagination controls are visible and usable

steps.action: Apply search='miami', status='New', sort='score', click Next page
steps.expected: All new filters remain functional on mobile
steps.observed: Search/status/sort/pagination function correctly on mobile, but insurer filter still has only 'All insurers' and cannot be used as an actual filter

assertions.issues: Mobile layout itself works, but full new-filter functionality is incomplete because insurer filtering is not exercisable.

assertions.title: Backward compat — existing leads render without errors

steps.expected: Legacy fixture page loads leads missing scoreBreakdown/EV factor
steps.observed: Fixture loads 6 legacy rows and shows validation header

steps.action: Open score popover for lead without scoreBreakdown
steps.expected: Graceful fallback message for missing breakdown
steps.observed: Popover shows 'No breakdown available — lead predates this feature. Score will update on next scraper run.'

steps.action: Open score popover for Sandra Diaz lead (has breakdown but no EV factor)
steps.expected: Graceful fallback message for missing EV factor
steps.observed: Popover shows 'Expected value data is not available for this lead yet.'

frictions.description: Clickable table rows and score badges intermittently became blocked by overlay state when a drawer/popover was open.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted refs and explicitly closed drawer/popover before continuing (plus targeted DOM eval for score-button click where needed).

frictions.description: Insurer filter had only one available option ('All insurers') in tested data, limiting exact contract step coverage.
frictions.resolution: Not resolvable from UI; captured as assertion failure evidence.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CROSS-006), 3 failed (VAL-CROSS-002/003/004). Failures were due to missing homestead rendering in main leads data and non-exercisable insurer filter options in current dataset.
